title: Hex Casting 3D
description: 3D models for blocks and items in Hex Casting mod
body:
This is the resource pack that changes appearances of all items and most of blocks in [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) mod to 3d.

The one for 1.20.1 is supports Hex Casting version after 0.11.3. It means Vacant Pigment have new appearance.
 
This is almost compatible with [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft): The position of item models has been adjusted to fit the position of your hands in VR, but Staves and Jeweler's Hammer looks smaller in VR (adjust those scale for VR makes too big for non-VR).

These block models are fits Hex Casting default block textures, so if you use this with other resource packs that changes block textures in Hex Casting, it maybe ruin the look of them.

![Blocks, items in invisible item frame, and me, holding Edified Staff and Spellbook, and wearing Scrying Lens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lq7573Hl/images/93b6da4696d711e6643c7ee5df1413890c53cb3f.png)
